welcome.title: Welcome to StealthCopilot
welcome.desc: StealthCopilot helps you in real-time: it listens to your interviewer, generates professional English responses, and speaks in your cloned voice — all invisibly.
welcome.hearingDesc: Captures interviewer speech and provides real-time Chinese suggestions
welcome.speakingDesc: You speak Chinese; system outputs fluent cloned English audio
welcome.videoDesc: Lip-synced real face, invisible to screen recording
welcome.hint: Click Next to begin setup — takes about 5 minutes

deps.title: Dependency Check
deps.desc: Check required system components. Missing items must be installed manually from the guide.
deps.virtualMicHint: Select this once. In the meeting app, choose the same device for both speaker and microphone; StealthCopilot captures interviewer audio from it and writes your target-language speech back to it.

apiKeys.title: Configure API Keys
apiKeys.desc: Enter keys for required services. Voice cloning is optional; the default voice works without it. Keys are stored in the system Keychain and never uploaded.
apiKeys.secureNote: 🔒 Keys are encrypted in system Keychain, never stored as plain text

voice.title: Voice Cloning
voice.desc: Optional: read the iFlytek training text to create your personal voice. The default voice is used when cloning is skipped.
voice.credentialsRequired: Configure and test the iFlytek VoiceClone App ID, API Key, and API Secret first. You can skip this step and use the default voice.
voice.trainTextError: Failed to load training text: {message}. Test the service keys first, or skip and use the default voice.
voice.submittedDesc: iFlytek is training the voice. Check status later; Asset ID will be saved automatically when ready.
voice.doneDesc: Your personal voice has been saved. Speaking chain will use the cloned voice.
voice.skippedDesc: Speaking chain will use the default voice. You can add a personal cloned voice later in Settings.
voice.readAloud: Please read the iFlytek training text aloud:
voice.sampleText: I am a software engineer with extensive experience in designing and implementing distributed systems. In my previous role, I led the migration of a monolithic application to a microservices architecture, which improved scalability by 300%. I am passionate about clean code and believe that good engineering practices are essential for long-term team success.
voice.micError: Cannot access microphone. Please check system permissions.

done.title: Setup Complete
done.desc: Your configuration has been saved. Click Finish to enter the main interface.
done.hint: Optional items can be completed later in Settings

resume.title: Import Resume
resume.desc: Upload your resume for local AI indexing to help answer related questions

devices.virtualMicHint: In the meeting app, choose this device for both speaker and microphone; StealthCopilot captures interviewer audio from it and writes your target-language speech back to it.

resume.empty: Drag a resume here or click Upload to select a file

dashboard.systemDesc: Meeting route normal · AI assist available
dashboard.systemWarning: Some assistive features are limited. The meeting route can continue.
dashboard.videoDirectDesc: Video chain is in direct mode: lip sync is temporarily off, while your real camera continues into the meeting.
dashboard.hearingDesc: Understand the interviewer and show subtitles plus answer suggestions
dashboard.speakingDesc: Turn your native-language answer into target-language speech
dashboard.videoDesc: Sync camera video into the meeting virtual camera

preflight.modalBlockedDesc: These items will prevent the chains from working correctly. Fix them before starting for a stable session.
preflight.modalWarningDesc: The current setup can start, but some assistive features will be limited. The meeting can still continue.
preflight.warningTitle: You can start, but some features will be limited:
preflight.ffmpegMissing: FFmpeg is not installed, so audio/video capture is unavailable.
preflight.virtualAudioMissing: The virtual audio device is not installed, so the meeting audio virtual channel is unavailable.
preflight.virtualCameraMissing: The virtual camera is not installed, so the meeting cannot select processed video.
preflight.meetingAudioMissing: Meeting audio virtual channel is not selected.
preflight.speakingMicMissing: Your speaking microphone is not selected.
preflight.realCameraMissing: Your real camera is not selected.
preflight.meetingCameraMissing: Meeting virtual camera is not selected.
preflight.meetingAudioUnavailable: Previously selected meeting audio virtual channel "{name}" is unavailable. Please select it again.
preflight.speakingMicUnavailable: Previously selected speaking microphone "{name}" is unavailable. Please select it again.
preflight.realCameraUnavailable: Previously selected real camera "{name}" is unavailable. Please select it again.
preflight.meetingCameraUnavailable: Previously selected meeting virtual camera "{name}" is unavailable. Please select it again.
preflight.cameraLoop: Real camera and meeting virtual camera are both set to "{name}", which creates a video loop. Use a real device or screen capture as the real camera, and keep OBS Virtual Camera as the meeting virtual camera.
preflight.monitorOutputUnavailable: Previously selected translation playback device "{name}" is unavailable. Please select it again or use system default output.
preflight.hearingAsrMissing: Hearing chain ASR Provider is disabled. Select iFlytek RTASR in Advanced Settings.
preflight.speakingAsrMissing: Speaking chain ASR Provider is disabled. Select iFlytek Simultaneous Interpretation in Advanced Settings.
preflight.simultMissing: iFlytek Simultaneous Interpretation App ID / API Key / API Secret is not configured, so hearing and speaking chains cannot recognize or translate speech.
preflight.simultLangUnsupported: iFlytek Simultaneous Interpretation currently supports Mandarin Chinese → English only. Current direction is {src} → {dst}.
preflight.deepseekMissing: DeepSeek Key is not configured, so answer suggestions and polishing will be limited.
preflight.ttsMissing: TTS Provider is disabled, so the speaking chain cannot output target-language speech.
preflight.voiceCloneMissing: iFlytek VoiceClone is selected, but voice training is not complete. You can switch to the default voice first.
preflight.simliMissing: Simli Key or Face ID is not configured, so the video chain will use direct camera output without lip sync.

teleprompter.title: StealthCopilot
teleprompter.subtitle: Interviewer:
teleprompter.noResume: No active resume detected, suggestion feature disabled
teleprompter.circuitOpenWarning: Video chain is in direct mode: lip sync is temporarily off, while your real camera continues into the meeting.

meetingGuide.title: Meeting App Setup Guide
meetingGuide.subtitle: Feishu, Tencent Meeting, Zoom, and Teams use the same device routing.

speaker.title: Meeting speaker
speaker.desc: Select the virtual audio device bound in StealthCopilot so the hearing chain can capture interviewer audio.

mic.title: Meeting microphone
mic.desc: Select the same virtual audio device so the speaking chain can write target-language speech back into the meeting.

camera.title: Meeting camera
camera.desc: Select the StealthCopilot virtual camera so the video chain outputs the synced video feed.

routes.hearing: Meeting speaker -> virtual audio device -> hearing chain
routes.speaking: Speaking chain -> virtual audio device -> meeting microphone
routes.video: Video chain -> virtual camera -> meeting camera

meetingGuide.monitorNote: If the meeting speaker only points to the virtual audio device, you may not hear the interviewer. Set monitor output to headphones, or create a system multi-output device that sends meeting audio to both the virtual device and your headphones.

feishu.title: Feishu Meetings
feishu.desc: Before or during a meeting, open the device menu beside the microphone and switch microphone, speaker, and camera, then test them.

tencent.title: Tencent Meeting
tencent.desc: Open audio settings or the microphone device menu, use computer audio, then test microphone and speaker separately.

meetingAudio.title: Configure meeting audio virtual channel
meetingAudio.desc: Choose this device as both speaker and microphone in Feishu or Tencent Meeting.

physicalMic.title: Configure your speaking microphone
physicalMic.desc: StealthCopilot uses it to capture your native-language answer. Do not select it as the meeting microphone.

monitorOutput.title: Configure translation playback
monitorOutput.desc: Play interviewer translations to your headphones without sending them into the meeting microphone.

physicalCamera.title: Configure your camera
physicalCamera.desc: StealthCopilot uses it as the raw camera feed before video-chain processing.

virtualCamera.title: Configure meeting virtual camera
virtualCamera.desc: Choose this device as the camera in Feishu or Tencent Meeting.
